2606.27872.title: S$^2$-VLA: State-Space Guided Vision-Language-Action Models for Long-Horizon Manipulation
2606.27872.paper_summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated strong capabilities in robotic manipulation, but their performance degrades significantly in long-horizon tasks due to cumulative error propagation. This limitation largely arises from static feature fusion mechanisms that rely on fixed weights to combine visual, language, and action representations, preventing the model from adapting to different phases of task execution. To address this limitation, we propose S$^2$-VLA, a framework that introduces a State-Space Guided Adaptive Attention (SSGAA) mechanism. SSGAA maintains a belief state that tracks task progression and generates dynamic gating weights to adaptively fuse information from three complementary sources visual features for spatial perception, task intents for high-level task planning, and temporal action sequences for execution consistency. This adaptive fusion allows the model to shift its focus throughout task execution, aligning with the evolving requirements of different task stages. Despite its compact 2B parameter size, S$^2$-VLA consistently outperforms larger 7B-scale models and achieves state-of-the-art performance on long-horizon manipulation benchmarks, including LIBERO and SimplerEnv. highlighting the importance of adaptive feature fusion for long-horizon robotic manipulation.
2606.27872.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言-行動 (VLA) 模型在機器人操作中展現了強大的能力，但在長期任務中，由於累積誤差的傳播，其性能顯著下降。這一限制主要源於靜態特徵融合機制，該機制依賴固定權重來結合視覺、語言和行動表示，阻礙了模型適應任務執行的不同階段。為了解決這一限制，我們提出了 S$^2$-VLA，一個引入狀態空間引導自適應注意力 (SSGAA) 機制的框架。SSGAA 維護一個信念狀態，跟蹤任務進展並生成動態閘控權重，以自適應地融合來自三個互補來源的信息：用於空間感知的視覺特徵、高階任務規劃的任務意圖，以及用於執行一致性的時間行動序列。這種自適應融合使模型能夠在任務執行過程中調整重點，與不同任務階段的演變需求保持一致。儘管其緊湊的 2B 參數大小，S$^2$-VLA 始終超越更大的 7B 規模模型，並在長期操作基準測試中達到最先進的性能，包括 LIBERO 和 SimplerEnv，突顯了自適應特徵融合在長期機器人操作中的重要性。
2606.27872.author: Zhipeng Xie et.al.
2606.27872.authors: Zhipeng Xie, Zongyi Han, Xiangyi Wei, Shiliang Sun, Yang Li, Jing Zhao
